basic_details.job_title: Ministry of Heavy Industries Consultant Grade 2 Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Ministry of Heavy Industries Consultant Grade-2 (Technical) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Ministry of Heavy Industries Consultant Grade-2 (Technical) posts is 22-05-2026. It is advisable to submit your application well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Consultant Grade-2 (Technical) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a BE/B.Tech or Master's Degree in a relevant subject. Additionally, a minimum of 8 years of experience in a PSU, Government, Research Organization, or Industry is required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Consultant Grade-2 (Technical) post is 50 years as of 01-06-2026. Age relaxation is applicable for retired government servants.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Consultant Grade-2 (Technical) position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Consultant Grade-2 (Technical) post in the Ministry of Heavy Industries.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Consultant Grade-2 (Technical) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 1,45,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official website of the Ministry of Heavy Industries.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Consultant Grade-2 (Technical) role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview, which may be conducted online or offline.

faq.question: Q9. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based recruitment for the Consultant Grade-2 (Technical) position.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link are provided in the "Important Links" section of this article for your convenience.
